yListener, java.util.EventListener, net.jini.lookup.ServiceDiscoveryListener public class ClientServerInteractionManager extends java.lang.Object implements net.jini.discovery.DiscoveryListener, net.jini.lookup.ServiceDiscoveryListener Manager that h

ini.lookup.ServiceDiscoveryListener Manager that handles and eases the discovery of services using JINI. Helps the client service discovery. It discovers the lookup service. A configuration file can be provided in the constructor to specify unicast

be provided in the constructor to specify unicast locators, groups to join and the service to be located. After discovering a lookup service it queries for the given service and filters the dead services. Since: Ptolemy II 5.1 Version: $Id: Clien
